zh.Fairstead, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可費艾爾斯亞德

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Ferrers於大約1299年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，他的父親William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby28歲，母親Margaret Segrave26歲。他於1349年之後與Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1353年7月28日在英國英格蘭艾可費艾爾斯亞德享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Ferrers于大约1299年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，他的父亲William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby28岁，母亲Margaret Segrave26岁。他于1349年之后与Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1353年7月28日在英国英格兰艾可費艾爾斯亞德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Ferrers was born about 1299, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Segrave, was 26. He married Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer after 1349. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 28 July 1353, in Fairstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Ferrers est né environ 1299, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Segrave, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer après 1349. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1353, à Fairstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Ferrers um 1299 in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Segrave 26. Er hat nach 1349 Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Juli 1353 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Fairstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ferrers è nato il circa 1299 nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Segrave, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer dopo il 1349. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 28 luglio 1353, nel Fairstead, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ferrersが約1299年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Grobyは28歳，母Margaret Segraveは26歳であった。1349年以後にLady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1353年7月28日にイギリスイギリスエセックスファイルステアドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Segrave(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1349년 이후 Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1353년 7월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 파어스테아드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1299, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Segrave, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer após 1349. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1353, em Fairstead, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Ferrers родился около 1299 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Segrave, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer после 1349 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 28 июля 1353 г. в местности феирстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Ferrers nació aproximadamente 1299, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Ferrers 1st Lord Ferrers of Groby, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Segrave, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Ankaret le Boteler Baroness Strange of Blackmer después de 1349. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 28 de julio de 1353, en Fairstead, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
